title: Zabrze, Silesian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zabrze, Silesian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zabrze is a city in Silesian with a population of 170,557. A historic mining city in Upper Silesia, home to the Queen Luiza coal mine museum and a key center of Poland’s industrial heritage.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
